ValidationRule.description: The Invoice Date is not allowed by Finance
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, $User.IsFinanceManager__c = false, InvoiceDate__c < ProjectCostCenter__r.InvoiceDateLimit__c, OR( ISPICKVAL(InvoiceStatus__c,"Draft"), ISPICKVAL(InvoiceStatus__c,"Approval"), ISPICKVAL(InvoiceStatus__c,"Sent") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This invoice date is not allowed. Please get in touch with Finance. (IN016)
